headline: ComEd Recognizes Ferrero for Achievements in Energy Savings and Sustainability
summary: CHICAGO, May 15, 2026--ComEd and Ferrero today celebrated significant energy savings, sustainability achievements and partnership through the award-winning ComEd Energy Efficiency (EE) Program. Through energy-saving projects and operational improvements at its Franklin Park, Ill. manufacturing facility that began in 2020, Ferrero has saved nearly 8.5 million kilowatt-hours (kWh) of electricity, resulting in annual energy-bill savings of $777,000. headline: Phantom Data Centers Didn't Break the Power Grid—They Proved it Was Already Broken
summary: The requests flooding interconnection queues come from data center developers, private equity funds, land brokers, and shell companies, many of whom lack site control, a construction timeline, or even a signed customer. They secure a queue position, bet that powered land will attract a buyer, and wait. The industry calls them "phantom data centers," and the grid isn't prepared to handle them.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Hold on Exelon, Lowers Price Target to $49
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Shelby Tucker   maintains Exelon (NASDAQ:EXC) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $51 to $49.
